variables.name: NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL
variables.description: Supabase browser-safe

variables.name: NEXT_PUBLIC_SENTRY_DSN
variables.description: Derived automatically by `pnpm env:sync` (do not add to source files): SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY, SUPABASE_JWKS_URL, SUPABASE_PROJECT_REF Used by `@supabase/server` (API routes / Edge Functions): SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY, SUPABASE_SECRET_KEY, SUPABASE_JWKS_URL Sentry public DSN

variables.name: STRIPE_DEFAULT_PLAN_KEY
variables.description: Stripe price IDs (use STRIPE_PRICE_PRO, not legacy STRIPE_PRICE_ID)

variables.name: OBJECT_STORAGE_PROVIDER
variables.description: Object storage (prefer OBJECT_STORAGE_* over legacy CLOUDFLARE_R2_*)

variables.name: BETTER_AUTH_IDENTIFY_URL
variables.description: Better Auth Infrastructure KV identify endpoint (project-scoped; from dashboard)

variables.name: BETTER_AUTH_URL
variables.description: Derived at sync: BETTER_AUTH_KV_URL, NEXT_PUBLIC_BETTER_AUTH_KV_URL Better Auth application instance (ERP origin)

variables.name: AFENDA_OAUTH_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID
variables.description: Platform OAuth client IDs (public; pair with secrets in .env.secret)

variables.name: ERP_CSP_STRATEGY
variables.description: Transactional auth email (Resend) — from-address may live in .env.config or .env.secret AFENDA_AUTH_EMAIL_FROM=Afenda ERP <auth@yourdomain.com> CSP strategy: hybrid (public SRI + protected nonce), nonce, or sri

variables.name: UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_URL
variables.description: Redis (Upstash REST — URL in config, token in secret)

variables.name: TRIGGER_PROJECT_REF
variables.description: Trigger.dev (@afenda/execution — project ref + API URL in config; secret in .env.secret)

variables.name: OUTBOX_SCHEDULER_REQUIRED
variables.description: Execution spine policy (enqueue vs scheduled drain) Local default: OUTBOX_SCHEDULER_REQUIRED=false (degraded — no remote cron registration) Local spine profile: OUTBOX_SCHEDULER_REQUIRED=true + TRIGGER_SECRET_KEY=tr_dev_* Production overlay (.env.config.production): OUTBOX_SCHEDULER_REQUIRED=true

variables.name: BETTER_AUTH_SECRET
variables.description: Better Auth signing secret (min 32 chars — generate with: openssl rand -base64 32)

variables.name: AFENDA_OAUTH_GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET
variables.description: Platform OAuth client secrets (pair with AFENDA_OAUTH_*_CLIENT_ID in .env.config)

variables.name: AFENDA_DEV_LOGIN_PASSWORD
variables.description: Local dev sign-in (after pnpm db:bootstrap:local → pnpm auth:bootstrap:dev) Email defaults to dev-admin@localhost.afenda; override with AFENDA_DEV_LOGIN_EMAIL

variables.name: AFENDA_E2E_VIEWER_LOGIN_PASSWORD
variables.description: Optional override for E2E workspace_reader (defaults to ${AFENDA_DEV_LOGIN_PASSWORD}-viewer after auth:bootstrap:dev)

variables.name: BETTER_AUTH_API_KEY
variables.description: System Admin diagnostics — set to 1 to run full delegated Phase 9 gates on every page load (slow). Default page load uses structure-only; prefer the in-app "Run full delegated gate check" action instead. AFENDA_ACCOUNTING_READINESS_DIAGNOSTICS_FULL=1 Better Auth Infrastructure (dashboard / dash / sentinel plugins)

variables.name: AFENDA_AUTH_EMAIL_API_KEY
variables.description: Resend transactional email (auth verification, password reset, member invitations, 2FA OTP)

variables.name: AFENDA_RESEND_WEBHOOK_SECRET
variables.description: AFENDA_AUTH_EMAIL_FROM=Afenda ERP <auth@yourdomain.com> Passwordless 2FA scope — credential-only (default) | enforce-all (requires future Better Auth hooks; no-op today) AFENDA_AUTH_PASSWORDLESS_TWO_FACTOR=credential-only

variables.name: SUPABASE_DB_PASSWORD
variables.description: Resend developer MCP only (Cursor resend-dev server — NOT ERP runtime / tenant mail) RESEND_API_KEY=re_[your-resend-dev-or-sandbox-api-key] RESEND_FROM=onboarding@resend.dev Supabase Postgres (Afenda builds connection URLs from password + region + project ref)

variables.name: OBJECT_STORAGE_ACCESS_KEY_ID
variables.description: Optional explicit Postgres overrides (otherwise built at runtime): DATABASE_URL                 — explicit app override DATABASE_URL_DEDICATED       — dedicated pooler (db.[ref].supabase.co:6543) DATABASE_URL_DIRECT          — migrations; prefer session pooler when direct host fails locally: postgresql://postgres.[ref]:[password]@[SUPABASE_DB_POOLER_HOST]:5432/postgres DATABASE_URL_TRANSACTION       — shared transaction pooler (port 6543, app default) DATABASE_URL_SESSION           — shared session pooler (port 5432)

variables.name: TURBO_TEAM
variables.description: Turborepo remote cache (secret only — do not duplicate TURBO_TEAM in .env.config)

variables.name: SHADCN_STUDIO_LICENSE_KEY
variables.description: shadcn/studio MCP — license from https://shadcnstudio.com/mcp/onboarding Synced to .env for .cursor/mcp.json → shadcn-studio

variables.name: TRIGGER_SECRET_KEY
variables.description: Figma — auth shell design file (optional; used in Figma MCP / /ftc prompts) FIGMA_AUTH_DESIGN_URL=https://www.figma.com/design/2ZNqNOxyNb5TwCTBIaMVPD/loginauth Trigger.dev DEV secret key (cloud.trigger.dev → API Keys; use tr_prod_* in production)

variables.name: TRIGGER_SECRET_KEY_PROD
variables.description: Production-only Trigger key — merged over TRIGGER_SECRET_KEY when pushing Vercel production overlay

variables.name: DOCS_GITHUB_TOKEN
variables.description: @afenda/docs — GitHub REST token for last-modified page footer during production builds Fine-grained or classic token with contents:read on afenda-Xerp; optional (raises API rate limits)
